steps: Contact Goldman Sachs dividend operations to report USD 2,025.00 overpayment on GOOGL dividend for account 1901234567
Reference US-UK tax treaty 15% withholding rate vs. applied 13.5% rate that caused the overpayment
Request immediate credit adjustment or wire transfer of the excess USD 2,025.00 to client account
Obtain written confirmation from Goldman Sachs acknowledging the error and corrective action taken
